prompt: ok we're done for today, close out the session. we built the session-closeout skill, updated context/goals.md to add Q2 goals and mark Q1 done, updated current-priorities.md to reflect april reality, created context/ideas.md with a tiered build backlog, and updated CLAUDE.md to fix stale backlog items and add the ideas file to context.

assertions.text: Output contains a session summary with a 'What Got Done' section listing specific items
Output includes the final closeout block with all 4 fields: summary, decisions logged, priorities updated, memory saved
Output references running git status or git diff to ground the summary
Output checks context/current-priorities.md and makes a judgment on whether it needs updating
